title: JoynCleon | Hands-Free Quiet Automatic Electric Breast Pump
detail_text: Quiet Operation Designed with quiet technology, this pump ensures minimal disturbance during use, making it ideal for late-night pumping sessions. Automatic Functionality This automatic breast pump simplifies the process, providing a hassle-free experience for mothers on the go. Dual-Sided Electric Pump The Jingqi breast pump offers a dual-sided electric operation, allowing for efficient and comfortable milk extraction without manual effort. Integrated Milk Collection The pump's integrated milk collection system ensures a seamless and hygienic milk extraction process, reducing the risk of contamination. Portable Design Its compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry, perfect for mothers who need to pump while traveling or away from home.
detail_html:
Quiet Operation



Designed with quiet technology, this pump ensures minimal disturbance during use, making it ideal for late-night pumping sessions.






Automatic Functionality



This automatic breast pump simplifies the process, providing a hassle-free experience for mothers on the go.






Dual-Sided Electric Pump



The Jingqi breast pump offers a dual-sided electric operation, allowing for efficient and comfortable milk extraction without manual effort.






Integrated Milk Collection



The pump's integrated milk collection system ensures a seamless and hygienic milk extraction process, reducing the risk of contamination.






Portable Design



Its compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry, perfect for mothers who need to pump while traveling or away from home.

title: Justu | Hands-Free Bilateral Electric Breast Pump Automatic Wearable Portable
detail_text: Single-Or Double-Sided Use Choose between single or double-sided use depending on your needs, offering flexibility and convenience. Silent Operation With its quiet operation, this pump ensures discreet use, perfect for late-night feedings or public settings. Automatic Functionality This automatic breast pump simplifies the process, providing efficient and effortless milk expression. Hands-Free Design The JUSTU electric breast pump offers a hands-free experience, allowing you to multitask while feeding. Portable Wearable Design Designed for convenience, this wearable breast pump can be easily attached and removed, making it ideal for on-the-go moms.
detail_html:
Single-Or Double-Sided Use

Choose between single or double-sided use depending on your needs, offering flexibility and convenience.

Silent Operation

With its quiet operation, this pump ensures discreet use, perfect for late-night feedings or public settings.

Automatic Functionality

This automatic breast pump simplifies the process, providing efficient and effortless milk expression.

Hands-Free Design

The JUSTU electric breast pump offers a hands-free experience, allowing you to multitask while feeding.

Portable Wearable Design

Designed for convenience, this wearable breast pump can be easily attached and removed, making it ideal for on-the-go moms.

detail_blocks.text: Single-Or Double-Sided Use Choose between single or double-sided use depending on your needs, offering flexibility and convenience. Silent Operation With its quiet operation, this pump ensures discreet use, perfect for late-night feedings or public settings. Automatic Functionality This automatic breast pump simplifies the process, providing efficient and effortless milk expression. Hands-Free Design The JUSTU electric breast pump offers a hands-free experience, allowing you to multitask while feeding. Portable Wearable Design Designed for convenience, this wearable breast pump can be easily attached and removed, making it ideal for on-the-go moms.

page_json.name: Manual Hand-free Breast Pump
page_json.description: Mainland china

title: Real Bubee Intelligent Microcomputer Double Electric Breast Pump (Rechargeable)
detail_text: Newborns obtain immunity from breast milk and the breast milk is the best choice for baby growth, but sometimes you have no time to feed your baby directly. Don't worry! Our double electric breast pump, mummy's good helper, which makes it convenient for milk storage, helps the feeding and prevents breast milk spilled. Features: Use of unilateral or double pumping, easy to install, disassemble and change. Heat-resistant and safe PP material, BPA free. 18 levels of 2 modes (sucking/massage) can be set freely, indicator with red/green light shows the mode that the breast pump is running. Multiple power supply mode, such as computer, charging treasure, power adapter. 180-degree rotation with petal-type massage cushion gives mothers a soft and comfortable effect when suckling babies, gently stimulates mothers' breast milk flow. 3D damping system and low-noise motor. Usage Methods: Please wash hands before install and use it. All components are required to be sterilized in boiling water for about 10 minutes before or after using. Use cotton balls soaked with hot water to heat the nipple and mammary aureole first. Be relax and sit comfortably. Place the breast pump on your breast so that your nipple is properly centered in the tunnel. Press the power switch to enter the 90-second mode, it will be gradually increasing until the default intensity. Mothers can adjust the suitable level. Contains: 1 x Pump Device 1 x USB Cable Built in battery, 1000mah 2 x Milk Bottles 2 x Flanges [Standard 24mm] 2 x Silicone Duckbill/ Valves 2 x Silicone Diaphragm 2 x Connector Cover 2 x Tube 2 x Double Connector 2 x Single Connector Tips: Stop using if you feel painful. The postpartum mother should be used under the guidance of a doctor or professional nurse. 80 percent of the bottle volume is enough, it is suggested to use continuously less than 30 minutes per time. Do not use microwave to heat the milk, and do not mix up fresh milk with frozen milk. Specifications: Input: AC 220V, 50Hz Output: DC 5V, 1A Charging Time: 2 hours Working Time: 1 - 2 hours Brands: Real Bubee Item Type: Breast Pumps Material: ABS, PP, Silicone Powered Source: Rechargeable Battery Features: Intelligent, Massage, Ultra Soft, Washable Power Supply: 1000mAh Lithium-ion Battery Package weight: 0.530 kg Package size (L x W x H): 19.00 x 10.80 x 19.80 cm / 7.48 x 4.25 x 7.8 inches
detail_html:
Newborns obtain immunity from breast milk and the breast milk is the best choice for baby growth, but sometimes you have no time to feed your baby directly.

Don't worry! Our double electric breast pump, mummy's good helper, which makes it convenient for milk storage, helps the feeding and prevents breast milk spilled.



Features:

Use of unilateral or double pumping, easy to install, disassemble and change.

Heat-resistant and safe PP material, BPA free.

18 levels of 2 modes (sucking/massage) can be set freely, indicator with red/green light shows the mode that the breast pump is running.

Multiple power supply mode, such as computer, charging treasure, power adapter.

180-degree rotation with petal-type massage cushion gives mothers a soft and comfortable effect when suckling babies, gently stimulates mothers' breast milk flow.

3D damping system and low-noise motor.



Usage Methods:

Please wash hands before install and use it.

All components are required to be sterilized in boiling water for about 10 minutes before or after using.

Use cotton balls soaked with hot water to heat the nipple and mammary aureole first.

Be relax and sit comfortably.

Place the breast pump on your breast so that your nipple is properly centered in the tunnel.

Press the power switch to enter the 90-second mode, it will be gradually increasing until the default intensity. Mothers can adjust the suitable level.



Contains:

1 x Pump Device



1 x USB Cable



Built in battery, 1000mah



2 x Milk Bottles



2 x Flanges [Standard 24mm]



2 x Silicone Duckbill/ Valves



2 x Silicone Diaphragm



2 x Connector Cover



2 x Tube



2 x Double Connector



2 x Single Connector



Tips:

Stop using if you feel painful.

The postpartum mother should be used under the guidance of a doctor or professional nurse.

80 percent of the bottle volume is enough, it is suggested to use continuously less than 30 minutes per time.

Do not use microwave to heat the milk, and do not mix up fresh milk with frozen milk.



Specifications:

Input: AC 220V, 50Hz

Output: DC 5V, 1A

Charging Time: 2 hours

Working Time: 1 - 2 hours

Brands: Real Bubee

Item Type: Breast Pumps

Material: ABS, PP, Silicone

Powered Source: Rechargeable Battery

Our double electric breast pump, mummy's good helper, which makes it convenient for milk storage, helps the feeding and prevents breast milk spilled. Features: Use of unilateral or double pumping, easy to install, disassemble and change. Heat-resistant and safe PP material, BPA free. 18 levels of 2 modes (sucking/massage) can be set freely, indicator with red/green light shows the mode that the breast pump is running. Multiple power supply mode, such as computer, charging treasure, power adapter. 180-degree rotation with petal-type massage cushion gives mothers a soft and comfortable effect when suckling babies, gently stimulates mothers' breast milk flow. 3D damping system and low-noise motor. Usage Methods: Please wash hands before install and use it. All components are required to be sterilized in boiling water for about 10 minutes before or after using. Use cotton balls soaked with hot water to heat the nipple and mammary aureole first. Be relax and sit comfortably. Place the breast pump on your breast so that your nipple is properly centered in the tunnel. Press the power switch to enter the 90-second mode, it will be gradually increasing until the default intensity. Mothers can adjust the suitable level. Contains: 1 x Pump Device 1 x USB Cable Built in battery, 1000mah 2 x Milk Bottles 2 x Flanges [Standard 24mm] 2 x Silicone Duckbill/ Valves 2 x Silicone Diaphragm 2 x Connector Cover 2 x Tube 2 x Double Connector 2 x Single Connector Tips: Stop using if you feel painful. The postpartum mother should be used under the guidance of a doctor or professional nurse. 80 percent of the bottle volume is enough, it is suggested to use continuously less than 30 minutes per time. Do not use microwave to heat the milk, and do not mix up fresh milk with frozen milk. product.desc:
Newborns obtain immunity from breast milk and the breast milk is the best choice for baby growth, but sometimes you have no time to feed your baby directly.

Don't worry! Our double electric breast pump, mummy's good helper, which makes it convenient for milk storage, helps the feeding and prevents breast milk spilled.



Features:

Use of unilateral or double pumping, easy to install, disassemble and change.

Heat-resistant and safe PP material, BPA free.

18 levels of 2 modes (sucking/massage) can be set freely, indicator with red/green light shows the mode that the breast pump is running.

Multiple power supply mode, such as computer, charging treasure, power adapter.

180-degree rotation with petal-type massage cushion gives mothers a soft and comfortable effect when suckling babies, gently stimulates mothers' breast milk flow.

3D damping system and low-noise motor.



Usage Methods:

Please wash hands before install and use it.

All components are required to be sterilized in boiling water for about 10 minutes before or after using.

Use cotton balls soaked with hot water to heat the nipple and mammary aureole first.

Be relax and sit comfortably.

Place the breast pump on your breast so that your nipple is properly centered in the tunnel.

Press the power switch to enter the 90-second mode, it will be gradually increasing until the default intensity. Mothers can adjust the suitable level.



Contains:

1 x Pump Device



1 x USB Cable



Built in battery, 1000mah



2 x Milk Bottles



2 x Flanges [Standard 24mm]



2 x Silicone Duckbill/ Valves



2 x Silicone Diaphragm



2 x Connector Cover



2 x Tube



2 x Double Connector



2 x Single Connector



Tips:

Stop using if you feel painful.

The postpartum mother should be used under the guidance of a doctor or professional nurse.

80 percent of the bottle volume is enough, it is suggested to use continuously less than 30 minutes per time.

Do not use microwave to heat the milk, and do not mix up fresh milk with frozen milk.



Specifications:

Input: AC 220V, 50Hz

Output: DC 5V, 1A

Charging Time: 2 hours

Working Time: 1 - 2 hours

Brands: Real Bubee

Item Type: Breast Pumps

Material: ABS, PP, Silicone

Powered Source: Rechargeable Battery

Features: Intelligent, Massage, Ultra Soft, Washable

Power Supply: 1000mAh Lithium-ion Battery

Package weight: 0.530 kg

Package size (L x W x H): 19.00 x 10.80 x 19.80 cm / 7.48 x 4.25 x 7.8 inches

page_json.description: Haakaa. Philips Avent Breast Pump: Philips avent breast pump is the best choice for baby shaving, nursing, and hygiene. Silicone Milk Collector: Bpa-free silicone breast pump with silicone suction base. Haakaa Milk Collector: Bpa free, hygienic, non-toxic, odorless and leak-free. Breast Milk Collector: Bpa free, hygienic, non-toxic, odorless, hypoallergenic, healthy and environmentally friendly. title: BE Free Wearable Breast Pump - Pump Parts
detail_text: Changing breast pump parts regularly is crucial for maintaining hygiene, ensuring effective milk expression, and promoting the overall well-being of both the mother and the baby. Here's why it's important: Hygiene : Regularly changing silicone parts prevents the buildup of bacteria and mold, safeguarding your baby from potential infections and ensuring the expressed milk remains safe for consumption. Efficiency : Over time, silicone parts can wear out, affecting the pump's suction power and efficiency. Regular replacement ensures consistent and effective milk expression, saving you time and effort during pumping sessions. Comfort : Worn-out silicone parts may cause discomfort or irritation to the breast, nipples, or areola. Fresh, properly fitted parts ensure a comfortable pumping experience, encouraging mothers to maintain their breastfeeding routine. Milk Quality : Silicone parts in good condition help maintain the quality of expressed milk. Damaged parts could contaminate the milk or alter its composition, which is especially critical for newborns and infants. Preventing Leaks : Regularly changing parts, such as valves and diaphragm, prevents leaks during pumping. This not only saves precious breast milk but also keeps the pumping process mess-free and efficient. Longevity of the Pump : Proper maintenance, including timely replacement of silicone parts, prolongs the life of your breast pump. Regular replacements can prevent wear and tear on the pump motor, ensuring it functions optimally for a longer time. *Please note that the above mentioned and image serves as a guide only. Actual time to change depends on number of times used, washing and sterilisation method.
detail_html:
Changing breast pump parts regularly is crucial for maintaining hygiene, ensuring effective milk expression, and promoting the overall well-being of both the mother and the baby. Here's why it's important:

Hygiene: Regularly changing silicone parts prevents the buildup of bacteria and mold, safeguarding your baby from potential infections and ensuring the expressed milk remains safe for consumption.

Efficiency: Over time, silicone parts can wear out, affecting the pump's suction power and efficiency. Regular replacement ensures consistent and effective milk expression, saving you time and effort during pumping sessions.

Comfort: Worn-out silicone parts may cause discomfort or irritation to the breast, nipples, or areola. Fresh, properly fitted parts ensure a comfortable pumping experience, encouraging mothers to maintain their breastfeeding routine.

Milk Quality: Silicone parts in good condition help maintain the quality of expressed milk. Damaged parts could contaminate the milk or alter its composition, which is especially critical for newborns and infants.

Preventing Leaks: Regularly changing parts, such as valves and diaphragm, prevents leaks during pumping. This not only saves precious breast milk but also keeps the pumping process mess-free and efficient.

Longevity of the Pump: Proper maintenance, including timely replacement of silicone parts, prolongs the life of your breast pump. Regular replacements can prevent wear and tear on the pump motor, ensuring it functions optimally for a longer time.

*Please note that the above mentioned and image serves as a guide only. Actual time to change depends on number of times used, washing and sterilisation method.

This not only saves precious breast milk but also keeps the pumping process mess-free and efficient. Longevity of the Pump : Proper maintenance, including timely replacement of silicone parts, prolongs the life of your breast pump. Regular replacements can prevent wear and tear on the pump motor, ensuring it functions optimally for a longer time. *Please note that the above mentioned and image serves as a guide only. Actual time to change depends on number of times used, washing and sterilisation method.

product.desc:
Changing breast pump parts regularly is crucial for maintaining hygiene, ensuring effective milk expression, and promoting the overall well-being of both the mother and the baby. Here's why it's important:

Hygiene: Regularly changing silicone parts prevents the buildup of bacteria and mold, safeguarding your baby from potential infections and ensuring the expressed milk remains safe for consumption.

Efficiency: Over time, silicone parts can wear out, affecting the pump's suction power and efficiency. Regular replacement ensures consistent and effective milk expression, saving you time and effort during pumping sessions.

Comfort: Worn-out silicone parts may cause discomfort or irritation to the breast, nipples, or areola. Fresh, properly fitted parts ensure a comfortable pumping experience, encouraging mothers to maintain their breastfeeding routine.

Milk Quality: Silicone parts in good condition help maintain the quality of expressed milk. Damaged parts could contaminate the milk or alter its composition, which is especially critical for newborns and infants.

Preventing Leaks: Regularly changing parts, such as valves and diaphragm, prevents leaks during pumping. This not only saves precious breast milk but also keeps the pumping process mess-free and efficient.

Longevity of the Pump: Proper maintenance, including timely replacement of silicone parts, prolongs the life of your breast pump. Regular replacements can prevent wear and tear on the pump motor, ensuring it functions optimally for a longer time.

*Please note that the above mentioned and image serves as a guide only. Actual time to change depends on number of times used, washing and sterilisation method.

title: Jevon Baby Wearable Electric Breast Pump (Double Pump) | Direct to Storage | Hospital Grade Suction | Wireless Handsfree | Portable
detail_text: JEVON BABY: No. 1 Most Convenient Wearable Breast Pump 🔥 Still Pouring Pumped Milk Into Another Bottle or Bag? Spilled milk during transfer. Extra washing after every session. Trying to pump quietly at 2AM without making a mess. Most wearable breast pumps collect milk into a cup first. Then you still have to pour it into a feeding bottle or milk storage bag. That transfer step is where spills happen. detail_html:
JEVON BABY: No. 1 Most Convenient Wearable Breast Pump

🔥 Still Pouring Pumped Milk Into Another Bottle or Bag?

Spilled milk during transfer.

Extra washing after every session.

Trying to pump quietly at 2AM without making a mess.

Most wearable breast pumps collect milk into a cup first. Then you still have to pour it into a feeding bottle or milk storage bag. That transfer step is where spills happen.

Jevon Baby changes that.

❤️ Jevon Baby is a wearable breast pump designed to pump directly into a feeding bottle or milk storage bag — helping you skip the messy transfer step entirely.

WHY JEVON BABY IS THE SMARTER CHOICE?

✅ DIRECT-TO-STORAGE (ZERO TRANSFER = NO MILK LOSS)

The only hands free breast pump that connects directly to Feeding bottles or storage bags. Pump, seal, and store in seconds. Done. Nothing lost.

✅ HOSPITAL GRADE SUCTION

Don’t let the compact size fool you. Jevon Baby delivers up to 300mmHg hospital grade suction, matching the performance of heavy bedside machines. With 3 Modes and 9 Intensity levels, you can perfectly customize your pumping rhythm to match your natural flow and comfort.

✅ QUIET, HANDS-FREE & DISCREET

No more being tied down. Jevonbaby is a cordless wearable breast pump that fits discreetly inside your bra. It’s quiet and compact, so you can pump during work meetings, in the car, or while your baby sleeps right next to you.

✅ 7 SIZES INCLUDED FOR BETTER FIT

Stop wasting money on extra inserts. We include ALL 7 SIZES (13mm to 28mm) in every box. We ensure a perfect, painless, and leak-proof fit for every mom.

✅ 4-PART EASY WASH SYSTEM

Spend less time at the sink and more time with your baby. With only 4 simple parts to wash, it’s the ultimate portable breast pump for your busy lifestyle.

WHO IS JEVON BABY BREAST PUMP FOR?

❤️Working Moms – Pump efficiently while working with no hassle.

❤️Stay-at-Home Moms – Enjoy comfort while managing daily tasks.

❤️First-Time Moms – Perfect for those new to breastfeeding, with easy-to-use features.

❤️Active Moms – Designed for moms on the go who need a portable breast pump solution.

⚙️ PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS:

⭐Type: Double Wearable Electric Breast Pump (Wireless & Portable)

⭐Material: BPA-Free PP + Silicone + PPSU bottle

⭐Modes & Suction Levels: 3 Modes, 9 Intensity Levels Each – Massage, Expression Mode & Stimulation (Combination of Massage + Expression Modes)

⭐Charge Time: 3 Hours

⭐Usage Time: Up to 3 Hours (~ 5 - 6 Pumping Sessions)

⭐Charging Port: Type-C (Compatible with 5V 1A Adapter)

⭐Container Capacity: 150ml or 5 oz

⭐Auto Shut Off Time: 30 Minutes’ Auto Shut Off

⭐Compatibility: Standard/Narrow Neck Bottles or Wide Neck Bottles with the use of an Adapter

🛡️ WARRANTY & SUPPORT:

12 Months Local Warranty - Starts from Baby’s Birthday or Purchase Date (Whichever Is Later)

🎁 EXCLUSIVE $401 VALUE BUNDLE (FREE WITH PURCHASE):

We don't just sell you a pump; we support your journey.

✔️ 60 Breast Pump Milk Storage Bags – Worth S$38

✔️ 2 PPSU Bottles – Worth S$29

✔️ Breastfeeding Workshop by Professional Lactation Consultant

✔️ Baby Sleep Workshop by Dr. Ng Kexin

(💌 Contact hello@jevonbaby.com to claim your workshop sign-up link)

📦 WHAT’S IN THE BOX?

💠2 x Jevonbaby Wearable Breast Pumps

💠2 x Breast Shields (28mm)

💠12 x Nipple Funnel Inserts (13mm, 15mm, 17mm, 19mm, 21mm, 24mm)

💠4 x Diaphragms

💠4 x Valves

💠2 x Milk Bag Adapters

💠2 x Teats with Caps

💠2 x PPSU Bottles (150ml)

💠12 x Ready-to-Store Milk Storage Bags (150ml)

💠2 x USB-C Cables

💠2 x Dust Covers & Silicone Flanges

❓ FAQ

Q: Is the suction strong enough compared to a hospital pump?

A: Yes. Jevon Baby delivers up to 300mmHg hospital grade suction to support efficient milk expression. Start low and increase gradually to find your most comfortable and effective setting.

Q: Is it painful?

A: Not when you're fitted correctly. We include all 7 flange sizes (13mm–28mm) so you can find your exact fit.

Q: How loud is it? Can I use it in an open office?

A: It runs at under 50dB. Most moms pump at their desk without anyone noticing.

Q: How do I clean it? Is it complicated?

A: Only the milk-contact parts need to be washed. The breast shield, valve, diaphragm and nipple inserts are all hand-washable and safe for UV, steam, and boil sterilisation. Do not submerge the motor unit.

Q: Will it leak inside my bra?

A: The closed-system design combined with the correct flange insert fit prevents leakage. Make sure you're using the right funnel size — all 7 are included in the box.

Q: Can I pump directly into any milk storage bag?

A: The included milk bag adapter is compatible with Jevon Baby storage bags. The bags are gamma-ray sterilised and ready to use the moment you open the cap — no prep needed.

Q: I'm a first-time mom — is this easy to use?

A: Yes. Assembly is simple, all sizes are included, and our WhatsApp support team (+65 8509 3210) is fast. Message us and a real person will walk you through setup.

Q: How long does the battery last?

A: Up to 3 hours of use per charge — approximately 5 to 6 full pumping sessions. Charges in 3 hours via USB-C.

🚀 READY TO RECLAIM YOUR TIME?

Stop the ""pump-and-pour"" struggle. Protect every drop of your liquid gold.

[Add to Cart] now to secure your $401 Bonus Bundle while stocks last!

CONTACT US:

Need Assistance?

💌Email: hello@jevonbaby.com

💬 WhatsApp: +65 8509 3210 (Faster Response)

detail_html:
2PCS-EB46 2 PCS per box or 2 individual packs shipped randomly














Wholesale and distributors are invited.


















Buy now, don't miss it


It is an honor for us that you choose our products, and we will do our best to create a pleasant shopping trip for you.


Have a nice day!



Note: If it cannot be used normally, please contact customer service for video consultation and feedback problems to customer service


Some common problems and solutions


1. When turning on the ASI pump, you need to press and hold the power button for 5-10 seconds. If the charger cable is connected, the cable will not turn on. You need to pull out the charger cable and hold it to turn on.


2. If the pump cannot be reached after the engine is turned on, the engine pump can be removed and re -installed, and is tightened to avoid air leakage and start failure.


3. If you cannot turn on the product after receiving the goods, you can charge the product until it is full, then unplug the charger cable and turn it back on.


Feature:


1. Mode: Four modes (lactation mode, sucking mode, frequency conversion mode, normal sucking mode)


2. Each mode has 36 levels


3. The default lithium battery, can be used for a long time after charging


4. Liquid silicone material, softer and skin friendly than ordinary silicone, BPA free, safe and healthy


5. LED display, touch screen button


6. Breast protector is more appropriate and increases milk production.


Product description:



Model: EB46


Material: Liquid silicone + pp


Function: Give fresh milk safely for your baby


Strengths: 36 levels, 4 modes


Power Supply: T-PCY-C Filling


Brand Name: Dr.ISLA


Type of Mover: Electricity


Material properties: Liquid silicone, BPA free. Free PVC, latex, ftalat.

Color: blue, pink


Capacity: 210ml


Purpose: Collecting milk


Battery capacity: 1600mAh, fully charged in 3 hours, can be used 4-6 times


Noise Limit: <40DB

Air bag*2


Milk collector*2

Duck valve*2


Cable Filling Cable Type C*2

title: Upgrade Electric Breast Pump Handsfree With UV Sterilize & Heating Base BPAFree Silent Invisible Portable Double Breastmilk Pump
detail_text: 🌟ENGLISH VERSION🌟 *Dear Moms, Meet Your New Breastfeeding Companion - MY382 Upgrade Wearable Electric Breast Pump *Travel-friendly: Compact design fits most pumps. *Peace of mind: Hospital-grade sanitation meets baby-care standards. ⚡️Why You'll Love It⚡️ ✅ Perfect Fit Guaranteed 24mm flange with 19mm & 21mm converters included - no extra purchases needed for 95% of moms ✅ Discreet & Comfortable Shell-shaped design stays invisible under clothes (160ml capacity cups) ✅ Smart Nursing Experience 4 modes × 12 adjustable levels Voice guidance (with mute option) Auto-stop when full LED screen & 1200mAh battery (USB-C charging) ✅ Hospital-Grade Safety FDA/CE/ROHS certified food-grade materials With Fewer components,easy to clean ✅Multi-Functional Dust Cover (Optional Accessory) ✨ Gentle Warming Feature Maintains breast milk at a cozy 45°C (113°F) — no more chilly pumping sessions in winter! Promotes efficient milk flow while keeping comfort a priority. ✨ UV-C Sterilization Eliminates 99.9% of germs* in minutes, ensuring baby-safe hygiene while you pump. Perfect for busy moms who value safety and convenience. 🛒 Complete Kit Includes: Breast pump unit 19MM and 21MM flange insert USB cable EN manual Optional : multifunctional (heating & sterilizing) lid 💡Pro Tip: Multi-Functional Dust Cover/Double efficiency with 2 pumps! Save 50% expressing time for more baby cuddles. ❤️ Safety Note: Auto-shutoff after 30min protects sleeping moms. 🌟VERSIÓN EN ESPAÑOL🌟 *Queridas mamás, conozcan a su nueva compañera de lactancia - Sacaleches Eléctrico Portátil MY382 Mejorado *Práctico para viajes: Diseño compacto compatible con la mayoría de bombas. *Tranquilidad garantizada: Esterilización hospitalaria cumple estándares de cuidado infantil. ⚡️Por qué les encantará⚡️ ✅ Ajuste perfecto garantizado Incluye flange de 24mm con adaptadores de 19mm y 21mm - 95% de mamás no necesitan comprar accesorios extras ✅ Discreto y cómodo Diseño en forma de concha invisible bajo la ropa (copas de 160ml capacidad) ✅ Experiencia de lactancia inteligente 4 modos × 12 niveles ajustables Guía vocal (opción silenciar) Detención automática al llenar Pantalla LED y batería 1200mAh (carga USB-C) ✅ Seguridad hospitalaria Materiales grado alimenticio certificados FDA/CE/ROHS Operación silenciosa Menos componentes, fácil limpieza ✅Cubierta antipolvo multifuncional (accesorio opcional) ✨ Función de calentamiento suave Mantiene la leche a 45°C (113°F) - ¡Adiós a extracciones frías en invierno! Promueve flujo lácteo eficiente con máxima comodidad. ✨ Esterilización UV-C Elimina 99.9% de gérmenes* en minutos, garantizando higiene segura mientras extraes. Ideal para mamás ocupadas que valoran seguridad y conveniencia. 🛒 Kit completo incluye: Unidad principal Insertos de flange 19MM y 21MM Cable USB Manual EN Opcional_: tapa multifuncional (calentamiento & esterilización) 💡Consejo profesional: Usa cubierta antipolvo multifuncional/¡Doble eficiencia con 2 bombas! Ahorra 50% tiempo para más mimos con bebé. ❤️ Nota de seguridad: Apagado automático tras 30min protege a mamás dormidas. 🌟VERSION FRANÇAISE🌟 *Chères mamans, découvrez votre nouvel allié d'allaitement - Tire-Lait Électrique Portable MY382 Amélioré *Portable: Design compact compatible avec la plupart des soutiens-gorge. *Sérénité: Stérilisation médicale répondant aux normes infantiles. ⚡️Pourquoi vous l'adorerez⚡️ ✅ Ajustement parfait garanti Bouclier 24mm avec adaptateurs 19mm et 21mm inclus - 95% des mamans n'ont besoin d'aucun achat supplémentaire ✅ Discret et confortable Design en coquille invisible sous les vêtements (coupes de 160ml) ✅ Expérience intelligente 4 modes × 12 niveaux ajustables Guidage vocal (option muet) Arrêt automatique quand plein Écran LED et batterie 1200mAh (charge USB-C) ✅ Sécurité médicale Matériaux alimentaires certifiés FDA/CE/ROHS Fonctionnement silencieux Moins de pièces, nettoyage facile ✅Housse anti-poussière multifonction (accessoire optionnel) ✨ Chauffage doux Maintient le lait à 45°C (113°F) - Plus de sessions froides en hiver! Favorise écoulement efficace tout en préservant le confort. ✨ Stérilisation UV-C Élimine 99.9% des germes* en minutes, assurant une hygiène sûre pendant l'expression. Risparmia 50% tempo per più coccole. ❤️ Nota sicurezza: Spegnimento automatico dopo 30min protegge mamme addormentate. 🌟גרסה עברית🌟 *אמהות יקרות, הכירו את עוזר ההנקה החדש שלכן - משאבה חשמלית ניידת MY382 משודרגת *נוחה לנשיאה: עיצוב קומפקטי מתאים לרוב החזיות. *שקט נפשי: עיקור רפואי עומד בתקנים לטיפול תינוקות. ⚡️למה תאהבו אותה⚡️ ✅ התאמה מושלמת מובטחת פלנג' 24מ"מ עם מתאמים 19מ"מ ו21מ"מ - 95% מהאמהות לא צריכות רכישות נוספות ✅ דיסקרטי ונוח עיצוב קונכייה בלתי נראה תחת בגדים (כוסות 160מ"ל) ✅ חוויית הנקה חכמה 4 מצבים × 12 רמות כוונון הנשמה קולית (אפשרות השתקה) עצירה אוטומטית במלא מסך LED וסוללה 1200mAh (טעינה USB-C) ✅ בטיחות רפואית חומרים מזון מאושרי FDA/CE/ROHS עבודה שקטה פחות חלקים, ניקוי קל ✅כיסוי אבק רב-תכליתי (אביזר אופציונלי) ✨ חימום עדין שומר חלב ב-45°C (113°F) - לא עוד שאיבות קרות בחורף! מעודד זרימה יעילה עם נוחות מקסימלית. ✨ עיקור UV-C מחסל 99.9% מחיידקים* בדקות, מבטיח היגיינה תוך כדי שאיבה. מושלם לאמהות עסוקות הדוגלות בבטיחות. 🛒 ערכת מלאה כוללת: יחידה ראשית מתאמי 19מ"מ ו21מ"מ כבל USB מדריך אנגלי 💡טיפ מקצועי: השתמשו בכיסוי רב-תכליתי/הכפילו יעילות עם 2 משאבות! חסכו 50% זמן ליותר חיבוקים. ❤️ הערת בטיחות: כיבוי אוטומטי אחרי 30 דקות מגן על אמהות ישנות.
detail_html:
🌟ENGLISH VERSION🌟
*Dear Moms, Meet Your New Breastfeeding Companion - MY382 Upgrade Wearable Electric Breast Pump
*Travel-friendly: Compact design fits most pumps.
*Peace of mind: Hospital-grade sanitation meets baby-care standards.
 
⚡️Why You'll Love It⚡️
✅ Perfect Fit Guaranteed
24mm flange with 19mm & 21mm converters included - no extra purchases needed for 95% of moms
 
✅ Discreet & Comfortable
Shell-shaped design stays invisible under clothes (160ml capacity cups)
 
✅ Smart Nursing Experience
 
4 modes × 12 adjustable levels
 
Voice guidance (with mute option)
 
Auto-stop when full
 
LED screen & 1200mAh battery (USB-C charging)
 
✅ Hospital-Grade Safety
FDA/CE/ROHS certified food-grade materials
<55dB quiet operation
With Fewer components,easy to clean
 
✅Multi-Functional Dust Cover (Optional Accessory)
✨ Gentle Warming Feature
Maintains breast milk at a cozy 45°C (113°F) — no more chilly pumping sessions in winter! Promotes efficient milk flow while keeping comfort a priority.
 
✨ UV-C Sterilization
Eliminates 99.9% of germs* in minutes, ensuring baby-safe hygiene while you pump. Perfect for busy moms who value safety and convenience.
 
🛒 Complete Kit Includes:
Breast pump unit
19MM and 21MM flange insert
USB cable
EN manual

Optional : multifunctional (heating & sterilizing) lid

 
💡Pro Tip: Multi-Functional Dust Cover/Double efficiency with 2 pumps! Save 50% expressing time for more baby cuddles.
 
❤️ Safety Note: Auto-shutoff after 30min protects sleeping moms.

🌟VERSIÓN EN ESPAÑOL🌟

*Queridas mamás, conozcan a su nueva compañera de lactancia - Sacaleches Eléctrico Portátil MY382 Mejorado

*Práctico para viajes: Diseño compacto compatible con la mayoría de bombas.

*Tranquilidad garantizada: Esterilización hospitalaria cumple estándares de cuidado infantil.


⚡️Por qué les encantará⚡️

✅ Ajuste perfecto garantizado

Incluye flange de 24mm con adaptadores de 19mm y 21mm - 95% de mamás no necesitan comprar accesorios extras


✅ Discreto y cómodo

Diseño en forma de concha invisible bajo la ropa (copas de 160ml capacidad)


✅ Experiencia de lactancia inteligente


4 modos × 12 niveles ajustables


Guía vocal (opción silenciar)


Detención automática al llenar


Pantalla LED y batería 1200mAh (carga USB-C)


✅ Seguridad hospitalaria

Materiales grado alimenticio certificados FDA/CE/ROHS

Operación silenciosa <55dB

Menos componentes, fácil limpieza


✅Cubierta antipolvo multifuncional (accesorio opcional)

✨ Función de calentamiento suave

Mantiene la leche a 45°C (113°F) - ¡Adiós a extracciones frías en invierno! Promueve flujo lácteo eficiente con máxima comodidad.


✨ Esterilización UV-C

Elimina 99.9% de gérmenes* en minutos, garantizando higiene segura mientras extraes. Ideal para mamás ocupadas que valoran seguridad y conveniencia.


🛒 Kit completo incluye:

Unidad principal

Insertos de flange 19MM y 21MM

Cable USB

Manual EN

Opcional_: tapa multifuncional (calentamiento & esterilización)

💡Consejo profesional: Usa cubierta antipolvo multifuncional/¡Doble eficiencia con 2 bombas! Ahorra 50% tiempo para más mimos con bebé.


❤️ Nota de seguridad: Apagado automático tras 30min protege a mamás dormidas.


🌟VERSION FRANÇAISE🌟

*Chères mamans, découvrez votre nouvel allié d'allaitement - Tire-Lait Électrique Portable MY382 Amélioré

*Portable: Design compact compatible avec la plupart des soutiens-gorge.

*Sérénité: Stérilisation médicale répondant aux normes infantiles.


⚡️Pourquoi vous l'adorerez⚡️

✅ Ajustement parfait garanti

Bouclier 24mm avec adaptateurs 19mm et 21mm inclus - 95% des mamans n'ont besoin d'aucun achat supplémentaire


✅ Discret et confortable

Design en coquille invisible sous les vêtements (coupes de 160ml)


✅ Expérience intelligente


4 modes × 12 niveaux ajustables


Guidage vocal (option muet)


Arrêt automatique quand plein


Écran LED et batterie 1200mAh (charge USB-C)


✅ Sécurité médicale

Matériaux alimentaires certifiés FDA/CE/ROHS

Fonctionnement silencieux <55dB

Moins de pièces, nettoyage facile


✅Housse anti-poussière multifonction (accessoire optionnel)

✨ Chauffage doux

Maintient le lait à 45°C (113°F) - Plus de sessions froides en hiver! Favorise écoulement efficace tout en préservant le confort.


✨ Stérilisation UV-C

Élimine 99.9% des germes* en minutes, assurant une hygiène sûre pendant l'expression. Parfait pour mamans pressées soucieuses de sécurité.


🛒 Kit complet inclut:

Unité principale

Adaptateurs 19MM et 21MM

Câble USB

Manuel EN



💡Astuce pro: Utilisez la housse multifonction/Doublez l'efficacité avec 2 pompes! Gagnez 50% de temps pour plus de câlins.


❤️ Note sécurité: Arrêt automatique après 30min protège mamans endormies.


🌟VERSIONE ITALIANA🌟

*Care mamme, incontrate il vostro nuovo alleato - Tiralatte Elettrico Portatile MY382 Upgrade

*Compatto: Design adatto alla maggior parte dei reggiseni.

*Sicurezza: Sterilizzazione ospedaliera conforme agli standard pediatrici.


⚡️Perché lo amerete⚡️

✅ Vestibilità perfetta garantita

Bocchetta 24mm con adattatori 19mm e 21mm inclusi - 95% delle mamme non necessita acquisti extra


✅ Discreto e confortevole

Design a conchiglia invisibile sotto i vestiti (coppe da 160ml)


✅ Esperienza intelligente


4 modalità × 12 livelli regolabili


Guida vocale (opzione muto)


Arresto automatico a pieno


Schermo LED e batteria 1200mAh (ricarica USB-C)


✅ Sicurezza ospedaliera

Materiali alimentari certificati FDA/CE/ROHS

Funzionamento silenzioso <55dB

Menù componenti, facile pulizia


✅Copripolvere multifunzione (accessorio opzionale)

✨ Riscaldamento delicato

Mantiene il latte a 45°C (113°F) - Basta sessioni fredde d'inverno! Favorisce flusso efficiente con comfort.


✨ Sterilizzazione UV-C

Elimina 99.9% germi* in minuti, igiene sicura durante l'uso. Perfetto per mamme impegnate che cercano praticità.


🛒 Kit completo include:

Unità principale

Adattatori 19MM e 21MM

Cavo USB

Manuale EN



💡Consiglio: Usa copripolvere multifunzione/Doppia efficienza con 2 pompe! Risparmia 50% tempo per più coccole.


❤️ Nota sicurezza: Spegnimento automatico dopo 30min protegge mamme addormentate.


🌟גרסה עברית🌟

*אמהות יקרות, הכירו את עוזר ההנקה החדש שלכן - משאבה חשמלית ניידת MY382 משודרגת

*נוחה לנשיאה: עיצוב קומפקטי מתאים לרוב החזיות.

*שקט נפשי: עיקור רפואי עומד בתקנים לטיפול תינוקות.


⚡️למה תאהבו אותה⚡️

✅ התאמה מושלמת מובטחת

פלנג' 24מ"מ עם מתאמים 19מ"מ ו21מ"מ - 95% מהאמהות לא צריכות רכישות נוספות


✅ דיסקרטי ונוח

עיצוב קונכייה בלתי נראה תחת בגדים (כוסות 160מ"ל)


✅ חוויית הנקה חכמה


4 מצבים × 12 רמות כוונון


הנשמה קולית (אפשרות השתקה)


עצירה אוטומטית במלא


מסך LED וסוללה 1200mAh (טעינה USB-C)


✅ בטיחות רפואית

חומרים מזון מאושרי FDA/CE/ROHS

עבודה שקטה <55dB

פחות חלקים, ניקוי קל


✅כיסוי אבק רב-תכליתי (אביזר אופציונלי)

✨ חימום עדין

שומר חלב ב-45°C (113°F) - לא עוד שאיבות קרות בחורף! מעודד זרימה יעילה עם נוחות מקסימלית.


✨ עיקור UV-C

מחסל 99.9% מחיידקים* בדקות, מבטיח היגיינה תוך כדי שאיבה. מושלם לאמהות עסוקות הדוגלות בבטיחות.


🛒 ערכת מלאה כוללת:

יחידה ראשית

מתאמי 19מ"מ ו21מ"מ

כבל USB

מדריך אנגלי



💡טיפ מקצועי: השתמשו בכיסוי רב-תכליתי/הכפילו יעילות עם 2 משאבות! חסכו 50% זמן ליותר חיבוקים.


❤️ הערת בטיחות: כיבוי אוטומטי אחרי 30 דקות מגן על אמהות ישנות.

aiTexts: This Upgrade Electric Handsfree Breast Pump offers silent, portable double pumping for busy moms.
Features include UV sterilization and a heating base for hygiene and comfort during use.
Made from BPA-free materials for safety and health.
Its invisible design ensures discreet, comfortable wear anytime, anywhere.
Ideal for daily milk expression, it addresses convenience and sanitation with easy, handsfree operation.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
🌟ENGLISH VERSION🌟
*Dear Moms, Meet Your New Breastfeeding Companion - MY382 Upgrade Wearable Electric Breast Pump
*Travel-friendly: Compact design fits most pumps.
*Peace of mind: Hospital-grade sanitation meets baby-care standards.
 
⚡️Why You'll Love It⚡️
✅ Perfect Fit Guaranteed
24mm flange with 19mm & 21mm converters included - no extra purchases needed for 95% of moms
 
✅ Discreet & Comfortable
Shell-shaped design stays invisible under clothes (160ml capacity cups)
 
✅ Smart Nursing Experience
 
4 modes × 12 adjustable levels
 
Voice guidance (with mute option)
 
Auto-stop when full
 
LED screen & 1200mAh battery (USB-C charging)
 
✅ Hospital-Grade Safety
FDA/CE/ROHS certified food-grade materials
<55dB quiet operation
With Fewer components,easy to clean
 
✅Multi-Functional Dust Cover (Optional Accessory)
✨ Gentle Warming Feature
Maintains breast milk at a cozy 45°C (113°F) — no more chilly pumping sessions in winter! Promotes efficient milk flow while keeping comfort a priority.
 
✨ UV-C Sterilization
Eliminates 99.9% of germs* in minutes, ensuring baby-safe hygiene while you pump. Perfect for busy moms who value safety and convenience.
 
🛒 Complete Kit Includes:
Breast pump unit
19MM and 21MM flange insert
USB cable
EN manual

Optional : multifunctional (heating & sterilizing) lid

 
💡Pro Tip: Multi-Functional Dust Cover/Double efficiency with 2 pumps! Save 50% expressing time for more baby cuddles.
 
❤️ Safety Note: Auto-shutoff after 30min protects sleeping moms.

🌟VERSIÓN EN ESPAÑOL🌟

*Queridas mamás, conozcan a su nueva compañera de lactancia - Sacaleches Eléctrico Portátil MY382 Mejorado

*Práctico para viajes: Diseño compacto compatible con la mayoría de bombas.

*Tranquilidad garantizada: Esterilización hospitalaria cumple estándares de cuidado infantil.


⚡️Por qué les encantará⚡️

✅ Ajuste perfecto garantizado

Incluye flange de 24mm con adaptadores de 19mm y 21mm - 95% de mamás no necesitan comprar accesorios extras


✅ Discreto y cómodo

Diseño en forma de concha invisible bajo la ropa (copas de 160ml capacidad)


✅ Experiencia de lactancia inteligente


4 modos × 12 niveles ajustables


Guía vocal (opción silenciar)


Detención automática al llenar


Pantalla LED y batería 1200mAh (carga USB-C)


✅ Seguridad hospitalaria

Materiales grado alimenticio certificados FDA/CE/ROHS

Operación silenciosa <55dB

Menos componentes, fácil limpieza


✅Cubierta antipolvo multifuncional (accesorio opcional)

✨ Función de calentamiento suave

Mantiene la leche a 45°C (113°F) - ¡Adiós a extracciones frías en invierno! Promueve flujo lácteo eficiente con máxima comodidad.


✨ Esterilización UV-C

Elimina 99.9% de gérmenes* en minutos, garantizando higiene segura mientras extraes. Ideal para mamás ocupadas que valoran seguridad y conveniencia.


🛒 Kit completo incluye:

Unidad principal

Insertos de flange 19MM y 21MM

Cable USB

Manual EN

Opcional_: tapa multifuncional (calentamiento & esterilización)

💡Consejo profesional: Usa cubierta antipolvo multifuncional/¡Doble eficiencia con 2 bombas! Ahorra 50% tiempo para más mimos con bebé.


❤️ Nota de seguridad: Apagado automático tras 30min protege a mamás dormidas.


🌟VERSION FRANÇAISE🌟

*Chères mamans, découvrez votre nouvel allié d'allaitement - Tire-Lait Électrique Portable MY382 Amélioré

*Portable: Design compact compatible avec la plupart des soutiens-gorge.

*Sérénité: Stérilisation médicale répondant aux normes infantiles.


⚡️Pourquoi vous l'adorerez⚡️

✅ Ajustement parfait garanti

Bouclier 24mm avec adaptateurs 19mm et 21mm inclus - 95% des mamans n'ont besoin d'aucun achat supplémentaire


✅ Discret et confortable

Design en coquille invisible sous les vêtements (coupes de 160ml)


✅ Expérience intelligente


4 modes × 12 niveaux ajustables


Guidage vocal (option muet)


Arrêt automatique quand plein


Écran LED et batterie 1200mAh (charge USB-C)


✅ Sécurité médicale

Matériaux alimentaires certifiés FDA/CE/ROHS

Fonctionnement silencieux <55dB

Moins de pièces, nettoyage facile


✅Housse anti-poussière multifonction (accessoire optionnel)

✨ Chauffage doux

Maintient le lait à 45°C (113°F) - Plus de sessions froides en hiver! Favorise écoulement efficace tout en préservant le confort.


✨ Stérilisation UV-C

Élimine 99.9% des germes* en minutes, assurant une hygiène sûre pendant l'expression. Parfait pour mamans pressées soucieuses de sécurité.


🛒 Kit complet inclut:

Unité principale

Adaptateurs 19MM et 21MM

Câble USB

Manuel EN



💡Astuce pro: Utilisez la housse multifonction/Doublez l'efficacité avec 2 pompes! Gagnez 50% de temps pour plus de câlins.


❤️ Note sécurité: Arrêt automatique après 30min protège mamans endormies.


🌟VERSIONE ITALIANA🌟

*Care mamme, incontrate il vostro nuovo alleato - Tiralatte Elettrico Portatile MY382 Upgrade

*Compatto: Design adatto alla maggior parte dei reggiseni.

*Sicurezza: Sterilizzazione ospedaliera conforme agli standard pediatrici.


⚡️Perché lo amerete⚡️

✅ Vestibilità perfetta garantita

Bocchetta 24mm con adattatori 19mm e 21mm inclusi - 95% delle mamme non necessita acquisti extra


✅ Discreto e confortevole

Design a conchiglia invisibile sotto i vestiti (coppe da 160ml)


✅ Esperienza intelligente


4 modalità × 12 livelli regolabili


Guida vocale (opzione muto)


Arresto automatico a pieno


Schermo LED e batteria 1200mAh (ricarica USB-C)


✅ Sicurezza ospedaliera

Materiali alimentari certificati FDA/CE/ROHS

Funzionamento silenzioso <55dB

Menù componenti, facile pulizia


✅Copripolvere multifunzione (accessorio opzionale)

✨ Riscaldamento delicato

Mantiene il latte a 45°C (113°F) - Basta sessioni fredde d'inverno! Favorisce flusso efficiente con comfort.


✨ Sterilizzazione UV-C

Elimina 99.9% germi* in minuti, igiene sicura durante l'uso. Perfetto per mamme impegnate che cercano praticità.


🛒 Kit completo include:

Unità principale

Adattatori 19MM e 21MM

Cavo USB

Manuale EN



💡Consiglio: Usa copripolvere multifunzione/Doppia efficienza con 2 pompe! Risparmia 50% tempo per più coccole.


❤️ Nota sicurezza: Spegnimento automatico dopo 30min protegge mamme addormentate.


🌟גרסה עברית🌟

*אמהות יקרות, הכירו את עוזר ההנקה החדש שלכן - משאבה חשמלית ניידת MY382 משודרגת

*נוחה לנשיאה: עיצוב קומפקטי מתאים לרוב החזיות.

*שקט נפשי: עיקור רפואי עומד בתקנים לטיפול תינוקות.


⚡️למה תאהבו אותה⚡️

✅ התאמה מושלמת מובטחת

פלנג' 24מ"מ עם מתאמים 19מ"מ ו21מ"מ - 95% מהאמהות לא צריכות רכישות נוספות


✅ דיסקרטי ונוח

עיצוב קונכייה בלתי נראה תחת בגדים (כוסות 160מ"ל)


✅ חוויית הנקה חכמה


4 מצבים × 12 רמות כוונון


הנשמה קולית (אפשרות השתקה)


עצירה אוטומטית במלא


מסך LED וסוללה 1200mAh (טעינה USB-C)


✅ בטיחות רפואית

חומרים מזון מאושרי FDA/CE/ROHS

עבודה שקטה <55dB

פחות חלקים, ניקוי קל


✅כיסוי אבק רב-תכליתי (אביזר אופציונלי)

✨ חימום עדין

שומר חלב ב-45°C (113°F) - לא עוד שאיבות קרות בחורף! מעודד זרימה יעילה עם נוחות מקסימלית.


✨ עיקור UV-C

מחסל 99.9% מחיידקים* בדקות, מבטיח היגיינה תוך כדי שאיבה. מושלם לאמהות עסוקות הדוגלות בבטיחות.


🛒 ערכת מלאה כוללת:

יחידה ראשית

מתאמי 19מ"מ ו21מ"מ

כבל USB

מדריך אנגלי



💡טיפ מקצועי: השתמשו בכיסוי רב-תכליתי/הכפילו יעילות עם 2 משאבות! חסכו 50% זמן ליותר חיבוקים.


❤️ הערת בטיחות: כיבוי אוטומטי אחרי 30 דקות מגן על אמהות ישנות.

title: Youha The Ins (Ava) Gen 2 Wearable Handsfree Breast Pump w/ Bluetooth App
detail_text: Youha The Ins Gen 2 Wearable Handsfree Single Breast Bump is a small and lightweight breast pump with a collection cup to place inside your bra. Collection cup design featuring a compact pump motor connected directly to the breastshield and expressed breastmilk is collected in the cup. No tubes, no cords, no dangling bottles. Offering hands-free, more enjoyable and discreet way to express breastmilk. The INS breast pump is designed to use anytime you like, wherever you like. No more pumping schedule. Pump anywhere anytime as you want to. New APP function: My Youha App Function provides ultimate control and convenience. Connect your wearable pump to control remotely and track your breast milk through the My YOUHA app! Available on Andriod and IOS. These great features still the same for Gen 2 as for Gen 1: • Everything fits under your bra! Breast shield, collecting cup and pump unit • 3 Modes: Massage (to soothe or prepare the breast for pumping), Expression (continuous suction to pump breastmilk) and Mixed (cycles of massage mode in between each express mode cycle to stimulate more breastmilk flow) • Each mode (Massage, Expression, Mixed) has 10 levels intensity adjustment/frequency • Features quiet mode for discreet and silent pumping ( • Memory function - switch on and it starts on the same mode that you last used • Rechargeable breast pump with battery indicator • Closed system pump prevents backflow, thanks to the silicone membrane in the cup that acts as a backflow protector • USB-C cable for convenient charging, charge with your USB power plug, even computer, laptop, power bank and more • Auto shut off after 30 min • Intuitive and easy to use one-button design with (+/-) touch buttons to adjust intensity for Massage & Expression, frequency for Mixed • Breastshield made of full silicone is soft and comfortable and fits well over the breast • Made with food grade PP plastic and silicone, BPA free, Phthalate free Size is 11.5cm (height) and 7.5cm (depth) *This pump comes with 1 x 24mm and 1x 28mm breast shields and 1 x 22mm, 1x 26mm inserts You can purchase extra inserts to reduce breast shield size if needed. This product comes with a 12-month warranty from the time of purchase on product faults (for pump unit only, does not apply to pump parts). *Charge the pump using the original cable ONLY. Other cables can damage the pump. Damaged pump due to charging with a non-original cable VOIDS the warranty. Note that INs pump is the same item as AVA pump sold in Malaysia. Safe, convenient, and effective. The INS breast pump provides a mobile pumping method that maintains the quality and effectiveness of a non-mobile way, allowing you to express quickly and efficiently at your convenience. The INS breast pump is a closed system with a breast shield made from food-grade, frosted silicone, for your comfort and safety.
detail_html:
Youha The Ins Gen 2 Wearable Handsfree Single Breast Bump is a small and lightweight breast pump with a collection cup to place inside your bra. Collection cup design featuring a compact pump motor connected directly to the breastshield and expressed breastmilk is collected in the cup. No tubes, no cords, no dangling bottles. Offering hands-free, more enjoyable and discreet way to express breastmilk. The INS breast pump is designed to use anytime you like, wherever you like. No more pumping schedule. Pump anywhere anytime as you want to.

New APP function: My Youha App Function provides ultimate control and convenience. Connect your wearable pump to control remotely and track your breast milk through the My YOUHA app! Available on Andriod and IOS.

These great features still the same for Gen 2 as for Gen 1:

• Everything fits under your bra! Breast shield, collecting cup and pump unit

• 3 Modes: Massage (to soothe or prepare the breast for pumping), Expression (continuous suction to pump breastmilk) and Mixed (cycles of massage mode in between each express mode cycle to stimulate more breastmilk flow)

• Each mode (Massage, Expression, Mixed) has 10 levels intensity adjustment/frequency

• Features quiet mode for discreet and silent pumping (<60dB)

• Memory function - switch on and it starts on the same mode that you last used

• Rechargeable breast pump with battery indicator

• Closed system pump prevents backflow, thanks to the silicone membrane in the cup that acts as a backflow protector

• USB-C cable for convenient charging, charge with your USB power plug, even computer, laptop, power bank and more

• Auto shut off after 30 min

• Intuitive and easy to use one-button design with (+/-) touch buttons to adjust intensity for Massage & Expression, frequency for Mixed

• Breastshield made of full silicone is soft and comfortable and fits well over the breast

• Made with food grade PP plastic and silicone, BPA free, Phthalate free

Size is 11.5cm (height) and 7.5cm (depth)

*This pump comes with 1 x 24mm and 1x 28mm breast shields and 1 x 22mm, 1x 26mm inserts

You can purchase extra inserts to reduce breast shield size if needed.

This product comes with a 12-month warranty from the time of purchase on product faults (for pump unit only, does not apply to pump parts). *Charge the pump using the original cable ONLY. Other cables can damage the pump. Damaged pump due to charging with a non-original cable VOIDS the warranty.

Note that INs pump is the same item as AVA pump sold in Malaysia.

Safe, convenient, and effective. The INS breast pump provides a mobile pumping method that maintains the quality and effectiveness of a non-mobile way, allowing you to express quickly and efficiently at your convenience. The INS breast pump is a closed system with a breast shield made from food-grade, frosted silicone, for your comfort and safety.

product.highlights:
• Youha The Ins (Ava) Gen 2 Wearable Handsfree Breast Pump w Bluetooth App
  • Includes 1 x 24mm and 1x 28mm breast shields and 1 x 22mm, 1x 26mm inserts
  • More compact design, size is 11.5cm (height) x 7.5cm (depth)
  • Gen 2 is 15g lighter at 239g vs 254g for Gen 1
  • Smaller cup size at 150ml (vs 240ml for Gen 2) - as motor now takes some space inside the cup
  • Slightly larger battery (1200 mAh vs 1100 mAh for Gen 1)
  • 3 Modes: Massage (to soothe or prepare the breast for pumping), Expression (continuous suction to pump breastmilk) and Mixed (cycles of massage mode in between each express mode cycle to stimulate more breastmilk flow)
  • Memory function - switch on and it starts on the same mode that you last used
  • Rechargeable breast pump with battery indicator
  • Made with food grade PP plastic and silicone, BPA free, Phthalate free
  • 12-month local warranty

title: Philips Avent Double Electric Breast Pump SCF398/11
detail_text: Inspired by Baby. Effective for Mum. Enter a new era of expressing with Philips Avent’s Electric Breast Pump, designed to balance suction & nipple stimulation for natural milk flow. Key Features: ✅ Natural Motion Technology – Express more milk in less time with a cushion that mimics baby’s drinking pattern, seamlessly adjusting suction for maximum milk flow.* ✅ Soft & Adaptive Silicone Cushion – Fits 99.98% of nipple sizes (up to 30mm) for a comfortable fit.* ✅ Comfortable Expressing Position – No need to lean forward, allowing for a relaxed experience.* ✅ Personalized Experience – 8 stimulation & 16 expression levels for a customized session. ✅ Quiet & Portable – Rechargeable battery (lasts up to 3 sessions), discreet motor, and travel-friendly design. ✅ Easy to Use & Clean – Fewer parts for quick assembly, memory function saves last settings, and closed system prevents milk backflow. ✅ Digital Display & Timer – Tracks session duration for added convenience. What’s Included: ✔ 1x Motor Unit (Rechargeable) ✔ 2x Expression Kits ✔ 2x 4oz Bottles (with 0m+ Nipples & Sealing Discs) ✔ 1x Micro-USB Adapter ✔ 1x Travel Bag & Insulation Pouch ✔ 2x Disposable Breast Pads 💡 BPA-Free | Compact & Travel-Ready | Effortless Expressing Anytime, Anywhere
detail_html:
Inspired by Baby. Effective for Mum.

Enter a new era of expressing with Philips Avent’s Electric Breast Pump, designed to balance suction & nipple stimulation for natural milk flow.

Key Features:

✅ Natural Motion Technology – Express more milk in less time with a cushion that mimics baby’s drinking pattern, seamlessly adjusting suction for maximum milk flow.*

✅ Soft & Adaptive Silicone Cushion – Fits 99.98% of nipple sizes (up to 30mm) for a comfortable fit.*

✅ Comfortable Expressing Position – No need to lean forward, allowing for a relaxed experience.*

✅ Personalized Experience – 8 stimulation & 16 expression levels for a customized session.

✅ Quiet & Portable – Rechargeable battery (lasts up to 3 sessions), discreet motor, and travel-friendly design.

✅ Easy to Use & Clean – Fewer parts for quick assembly, memory function saves last settings, and closed system prevents milk backflow.

✅ Digital Display & Timer – Tracks session duration for added convenience.

What’s Included:

✔ 1x Motor Unit (Rechargeable)

✔ 2x Expression Kits

✔ 2x 4oz Bottles (with 0m+ Nipples & Sealing Discs)

✔ 1x Micro-USB Adapter

✔ 1x Travel Bag & Insulation Pouch

✔ 2x Disposable Breast Pads

💡 BPA-Free | Compact & Travel-Ready | Effortless Expressing Anytime, Anywhere

page_json.name: Philips Avent Double Electric Breast Pump SCF398/11
page_json.description: What's included: 1 X Double Electric Breast Pump - SCF358/11 1 X Fast Bottle Warmer - SCF358/00 2 X Natural Response Bottle 125ML 10 X Storage Cups 180ML 1 X Disposable Breast Pads 60pcs - SCF254/61 Inspired by Baby. Effective for Mum.Enter a new era of expressing with Philips Avent’s Electric Breast Pump, designed to balance suction & nipple stimulation for natural milk flow.Key Features:✅ Natural Motion Technology – Express more milk in less time with a cushion that mimics baby’s drinking pattern, seamlessly adjusting suction for maximum milk flow.*✅ Soft & Adaptive Silicone Cushion – Fits 99.98% of nipple sizes (up to 30mm) for a comfortable fit.*✅ Comfortable Expressing Position – No need to lean forward, allowing for a relaxed experience.*✅ Personalized Experience – 8 stimulation & 16 expression levels for a customized session.✅ Quiet & Portable – Rechargeable battery (lasts up to 3 sessions), discreet motor, and travel-friendly design.✅ Easy to Use & Clean – Fewer parts for quick assembly, memory function saves last settings, and closed system prevents milk backflow.✅ Digital Display & Timer – Tracks session duration for added convenience.What’s Included:✔ 1x Motor Unit (Rechargeable)✔ 2x Expression Kits✔ 2x 4oz Bottles (with 0m+ Nipples & Sealing Discs)✔ 1x Micro-USB Adapter✔ 1x Travel Bag & Insulation Pouch✔ 2x Disposable Breast Pads💡 BPA-Free | Compact & Travel-Ready | Effortless Expressing Anytime, Anywhere

title: ciiemen | Manual Breast Pump with Feeding Bottle
detail_text: Includes Bottle Comes with a milk bottle, making it a comprehensive solution for new mothers who need to store and feed their babies. Versatile Use Ideal for use during pregnancy, postpartum, or as a supplemental feeding method, this pump caters to various needs and scenarios. Convenient Design The pump's compact design makes it easy to carry around, allowing mothers to express milk on the go. Manual Breast Pump This manual breast pump is designed to help mothers express milk efficiently and comfortably, ensuring a hassle-free feeding experience for both mother and baby. Easy to Use With its intuitive design, this pump is easy to operate, even for first-time users.

Includes Bottle



Comes with a milk bottle, making it a comprehensive solution for new mothers who need to store and feed their babies.






Versatile Use

Manual Breast Pump



This manual breast pump is designed to help mothers express milk efficiently and comfortably, ensuring a hassle-free feeding experience for both mother and baby.






Easy to Use



With its intuitive design, this pump is easy to operate, even for first-time users.

product.highlights:
• Ideal for first-time mummies who will like to try pumping but do not wish to invest in expensive breast pumps.
  • Handy, portable, Handsfree. Ideal for travel.
  • Ideal to be used as spare pump to be kept in your work location.
  • Comparable to the big brands on the market if not even better!!

detail_text: Authentic Product As an authentic product, you can trust in the quality and effectiveness of the YikeXiong Electric Breast Pump. Single/Bilateral Use Designed for both single and bilateral use, this pump offers flexibility according to your needs. Portable This portable breast pump is easy to carry, making it perfect for on-the-go moms. Automatic Operation With its automatic operation, this breast pump ensures efficient and effortless milk extraction. Hands-free Design The YikeXiong Electric Breast Pump features a hands-free design, allowing you to multitask while pumping.
detail_html:
Authentic Product

As an authentic product, you can trust in the quality and effectiveness of the YikeXiong Electric Breast Pump.

Single/Bilateral Use

Designed for both single and bilateral use, this pump offers flexibility according to your needs.

Portable

This portable breast pump is easy to carry, making it perfect for on-the-go moms.

Automatic Operation

Hands-free Design

title: HULEZHI | Manual High-Suction Breast Pump 180ml
detail_text: Manual Suction Pump The MiaoMiaoJia manual suction pump offers a powerful suction, making it an efficient tool for breastfeeding mothers. Wide Mouth Design Its wide mouth design allows for easy milk collection, reducing the hassle of manual pumping. Single Side Use Designed for single side use, this pump provides comfort and convenience during milk expression. Durable Material Made from PP material, this pump is durable and safe for daily use, ensuring long-term reliability. Large Capacity With a capacity of 180ml, this pump ensures you can collect ample milk in one session.

Manual Suction Pump



The MiaoMiaoJia manual suction pump offers a powerful suction, making it an efficient tool for breastfeeding mothers.






Wide Mouth Design

Single Side Use

title: Horigen 3D Breast Pump Kit (2pcs) - 17mm/21mm/25mm/29mm (For Double Pump)
detail_text: Natural 3D breastfeeding feeling, 100% food grade silicone; BPA free, no plasticizer. 3D PAINLESS PUMPING BREAST PUMP KIT Product Description: 1. Soft comfortable 3D liquid silicone shield Horigen breast pump kit is made from soft and food grade liquid silicone flange which is similar as baby’s mouth. The lips absorbing on the breast, the palate and tongue alternatively squeezing and stretching the nipple to stimulate lactation, which brings mother the natural feeling of breastfeeding. It is more comfortable than hard plastic flange from other brands. 2. Suitable for ALL brand pump Machine Suitable for ALL brand pump Machine (like Spectra, MUIFA, Zeus, Ele, Real Bubee, Bebeta, cmbear, Doopser, Plextone, Wisemom, Philips Avent, Huppy Buppy, Phanpy...more) 3. BPA free and closed system, Less parts and easy to clean. All parts of the pump are made from food grade material and do not contain BPA and any hazardous content. The pump is a closed system pump. The milk never flow back into the tubing and pump motor. Meanwhile, it contains few parts and each part is easy to clean. 4. 4 size for you to choose 3D breast pump kit have four size for you to choose: 17mm, 21mm, 25mm, 29mm. Suitable for all mother 5. Can steam sterilized and boiling water sterilized. Reminder: All accessories that come into contact with breast milk need to be disinfected daily, recommended to replace them every 3 months. Wish you a wonderful breastfeeding journey. Contact us to solve all your questions!
detail_html:
Natural 3D breastfeeding feeling, 100% food grade silicone; BPA free, no plasticizer.

3D PAINLESS PUMPING BREAST PUMP KIT

Product Description:

1. Soft comfortable 3D liquid silicone shield

Horigen breast pump kit is made from soft and food grade liquid silicone flange which is similar as baby’s mouth. The lips absorbing on the breast, the palate and tongue alternatively squeezing and stretching the nipple to stimulate lactation, which brings mother the natural feeling of breastfeeding. It is more comfortable than hard plastic flange from other brands.

2. Suitable for ALL brand pump Machine

Suitable for ALL brand pump Machine (like Spectra, MUIFA, Zeus, Ele, Real Bubee, Bebeta, cmbear, Doopser, Plextone, Wisemom, Philips Avent, Huppy Buppy, Phanpy...more)

3. BPA free and closed system, Less parts and easy to clean.

All parts of the pump are made from food grade material and do not contain BPA and any hazardous content. The pump is a closed system pump. The milk never flow back into the tubing and pump motor. Meanwhile, it contains few parts and each part is easy to clean.

4. 4 size for you to choose

3D breast pump kit have four size for you to choose: 17mm, 21mm, 25mm, 29mm. Suitable for all mother

5. Can steam sterilized and boiling water sterilized.

Reminder:

All accessories that come into contact with breast milk need to be disinfected daily, recommended to replace them every 3 months.

Wish you a wonderful breastfeeding journey.

Contact us to solve all your questions!

title: SG【Ready Stock】Electric Breast Pump Ultra-Quiet Wearable Pump BPA-Free 200ml Hands-Free Design Pump
detail_text: Welcome to TropiTech House! Why choose us？ ✔ Local SG seller — Ready stocks in Singapore, no long waits. ✔ Lightning-Fast Delivery – Orders packed within 12 hours, delivered in 1-3 days. ✔ Preferential policy — Follow our store to receive coupons. Proudly serving Singapore with quality products and hassle-free service since 2019. Noyoconn® Ultra-Quiet Wearable Pump – 40dB Silent Motor, BPA-Free, 200ml Hands-Free Design Experience ultimate discretion with this 40dB silent breast pump, quieter than a whisper, perfect for nighttime or public use. The wearable design fits snugly in your bra, freeing your hands for multitasking. Featuring bionic suction technology (100–115 cycles/min) and 9 adjustable modes, it mimics natural nursing to boost milk flow. The 200ml BPA-free bottles prevent spills, while the anti-backflow system ensures hygienic pumping. Recharge via USB-C (3 hours for 2–3 sessions) and enjoy effortless cleaning with fully detachable parts. Product Description 1. True Hands-Free Freedom Designed for active moms, this wearable breast pump fits discreetly inside your bra, allowing you to pump while working, commuting, or caring for your baby. Its ergonomic, close-fit breast shields ensure natural positioning without restricting movement. 2. Bionic Lactation Technology Baby-like Suction Rhythm: Mimics infant nursing with 9 adjustable suction levels and a dual-phase mode (2-minute stimulation followed by expression). Bilateral Synchronized Pulsation: Delivers balanced, gentle pulses (100–115 cycles/minute) to efficiently trigger let-down and maximize milk output. 3. Ultra-Quiet & Discreet Operation With a 40dB silent motor, pump anytime without disturbing your baby’s sleep or drawing attention. Perfect for nighttime use or public settings. 4. Anti-Backflow Hygiene System Duckbill Valve + Gas-Liquid Separation Membrane: Prevents milk from flowing back into the tubing or motor, eliminating contamination risks. FDA-Safe, BPA-Free Materials: All parts touching milk are non-toxic and odor-free, ensuring peace of mind. 5. Lightweight & Portable Compact, Round Design: Easily tucks into bags for on-the-go use. 800mAh Rechargeable Battery: Provides 2–3 full pumping sessions (9th gear) after just 3 hours of charging. 6. Effortless Cleaning & Assembly Fully Detachable Parts: No hidden crevices for thorough sterilization. 200ml Spill-Proof Bottle: Features a wide pour spout for mess-free transfers to storage bags or bottles. 7. Comfort-Focused Features Natural Breast Expansion: Adjustable suction strength prevents nipple trauma. Soft Silicone Shields: Flexible sizing adapts to breast shape for a pain-free experience. Key Specs: Noise Level: 40dB (quieter than a whisper) Battery: 800mAh lithium (USB-C rechargeable) Capacity: 200ml per bottle Weight: Ultra-lightweight, discreet under clothing Included Accessories: 2x BPA-free bottles & lids Duckbill valves, backflow membranes USB charging cable, storage pouch Empower Your Nursing Journey – Combining Innovation, Comfort, and Silence for Confident Motherhood!
detail_html:
Welcome to TropiTech House!

Why choose us？

✔ Local SG seller — Ready stocks in Singapore, no long waits.

✔Lightning-Fast Delivery – Orders packed within 12 hours, delivered in 1-3 days.

✔Preferential policy— Follow our store to receive coupons.

Proudly serving Singapore with quality products and hassle-free service since 2019.

Noyoconn® Ultra-Quiet Wearable Pump – 40dB Silent Motor, BPA-Free, 200ml Hands-Free Design

Experience ultimate discretion with this 40dB silent breast pump, quieter than a whisper, perfect for nighttime or public use. The wearable design fits snugly in your bra, freeing your hands for multitasking. Featuring bionic suction technology (100–115 cycles/min) and 9 adjustable modes, it mimics natural nursing to boost milk flow. The 200ml BPA-free bottles prevent spills, while the anti-backflow system ensures hygienic pumping. Recharge via USB-C (3 hours for 2–3 sessions) and enjoy effortless cleaning with fully detachable parts.

Product Description

1. True Hands-Free Freedom

Designed for active moms, this wearable breast pump fits discreetly inside your bra, allowing you to pump while working, commuting, or caring for your baby. Its ergonomic, close-fit breast shields ensure natural positioning without restricting movement.

2. Bionic Lactation Technology

Baby-like Suction Rhythm: Mimics infant nursing with 9 adjustable suction levels and a dual-phase mode (2-minute stimulation followed by expression).

Bilateral Synchronized Pulsation: Delivers balanced, gentle pulses (100–115 cycles/minute) to efficiently trigger let-down and maximize milk output.

3. Ultra-Quiet & Discreet Operation

With a 40dB silent motor, pump anytime without disturbing your baby’s sleep or drawing attention. Perfect for nighttime use or public settings.

4. Anti-Backflow Hygiene System

Duckbill Valve + Gas-Liquid Separation Membrane: Prevents milk from flowing back into the tubing or motor, eliminating contamination risks.

FDA-Safe, BPA-Free Materials: All parts touching milk are non-toxic and odor-free, ensuring peace of mind.

5. Lightweight & Portable

Compact, Round Design: Easily tucks into bags for on-the-go use.

800mAh Rechargeable Battery: Provides 2–3 full pumping sessions (9th gear) after just 3 hours of charging.

6. Effortless Cleaning & Assembly

Fully Detachable Parts: No hidden crevices for thorough sterilization.

200ml Spill-Proof Bottle: Features a wide pour spout for mess-free transfers to storage bags or bottles.

7. Comfort-Focused Features

Natural Breast Expansion: Adjustable suction strength prevents nipple trauma.

Soft Silicone Shields: Flexible sizing adapts to breast shape for a pain-free experience.

Key Specs:

Noise Level: 40dB (quieter than a whisper)

Battery: 800mAh lithium (USB-C rechargeable)

Capacity: 200ml per bottle

Weight: Ultra-lightweight, discreet under clothing

Included Accessories:

2x BPA-free bottles & lids

Duckbill valves, backflow membranes

USB charging cable, storage pouch

Empower Your Nursing Journey – Combining Innovation, Comfort, and Silence for Confident Motherhood!

title: Wearable Electric Breast Pump - Painless Fully Automatic Hands-Free Milk Collector,Comfortable Breastfeeding Assistant
detail_text: Features: 1.The wearable design allows you to multitask, whether it's doing household chores or playing with your adorable child, making it a time-efficient solution for milk pumping. 2.It offers three selectable modes: a massage mode, an expression mode, and a mixed mode, each with nine adjustable suction levels for a more comfortable milk pumping experience. 3.The design is both overflow-proof and backflow-resistant, ensuring no milk is wasted or contaminated. Its integrated design eliminates the need for tubes, making assembly and use straightforward. 4.Constructed from superior ABS material, it is skin-friendly and easy to maintain. 5.Operating at a low noise level of under 60dB, it won't disturb a sleeping baby. And the milk pump features a built-in high-capacity battery that lasts for 1.5 hours when fully charged and can be conveniently charged using a power bank, AC adapter, laptop, etc. 6.Its compact and lightweight design, along with the included carrying bag, makes it convenient for use at home or while traveling. Packing List: 1* Box 1* manual 1 * Breast Pump 1 * USB Cable
detail_html:
Features:
1.The wearable design allows you to multitask, whether it's doing household chores or playing with your adorable child, making it a time-efficient solution for milk pumping.
2.It offers three selectable modes: a massage mode, an expression mode, and a mixed mode, each with nine adjustable suction levels for a more comfortable milk pumping experience.
3.The design is both overflow-proof and backflow-resistant, ensuring no milk is wasted or contaminated. Its integrated design eliminates the need for tubes, making assembly and use straightforward.
4.Constructed from superior ABS material, it is skin-friendly and easy to maintain.
5.Operating at a low noise level of under 60dB, it won't disturb a sleeping baby.
And the milk pump features a built-in high-capacity battery that lasts for 1.5 hours when fully charged and can be conveniently charged using a power bank, AC adapter, laptop, etc.
6.Its compact and lightweight design, along with the included carrying bag, makes it convenient for use at home or while traveling.


Packing List:
1*  Box

1* manual

1 * Breast Pump

1 * USB Cable

Product Model:Rh228

Product Material:Silicone, Pp

Nursing Bottle Capacity:150ml

Product Weight:470G

Packing Quantity:24 Sets

Color Size:20x9.5x20cm

Health Tips

. Wash Your Hands before Milking Or Handling Breast Milk Breast Pump

. Breast Pump before Milking, Use Hot Towel to Compress Breast Massage to Stimulate Areola and Make Breast Compley Smooth

. When Milking Breasts Or Nipples Feel Pain with Pressure Suitable for Yourself, Stop Milking

. Milking Only Needs to Squeeze out Eight Points (The Time Should Not Exceed 20 Minutes)

. Use a Container with a Lid When Storing Breast Milk

. Clean up Breast Milk That Has Been Refrigerated for More than 72 Hours (3 Days)

. Do Not Put Refrigerated Breast Milk and Fresh Breast Milk Together for Feeding.

. Put the Refrigerated Breast Milk Thaw Or Link Container in Milk Warmer Warm Milk for Feeding

. after the Frozen Breast Milk Is Frozen, If the Baby Cannot Drink It after 24 Hours, Please Do Not Dispose the Rest of the Frozen Breast Milk and the Container.

title: S32 Breast Pump - Single Pump (Hospital grade) - Wearable Handsfree Breast Pump Quiet Silent
detail_text: Product introduction: Mode : 4 modes Pumping level : 12 levels 1. Stimulation mode In the early post partum period, the milk ducts are not easy to conduct, so this mode can be used to stimulate the breasts and promote breast milk secretion 2. Expression mode Realistic simulation of baby's sucking, stimulating mother's smooth milk production 3. Massage mode During postpartum breastfeeding, breasts are prone to sweeping, pain, pumps and other breast discomfort, so use this mode to relieve breast problems 4. Automatic mode (Between massage mode and expression mode, suction is flat) This mode has 12 levels, suitable for most mothers Charging the breast pump: Only use DC 5V == 1A adaptor and original cable to charge, else you may risk damaging product.
detail_html:
Product introduction:

Mode : 4 modes 

Pumping level : 12 levels

1. Stimulation mode

In the early post partum period, the milk ducts are not easy to conduct, so this mode can be used to stimulate the breasts and promote breast milk secretion 

2. Expression mode 

Realistic simulation of baby's sucking, stimulating mother's smooth milk production

3. Massage mode 

During postpartum breastfeeding, breasts are prone to sweeping, pain, pumps and other breast discomfort, so use this mode to relieve breast problems

4. Automatic mode 

(Between massage mode and expression mode, suction is flat)

This mode has 12 levels, suitable for most mothers

Charging the breast pump: Only use DC 5V == 1A adaptor and original cable to charge, else you may risk damaging product.
